title: Making off without payment as defined in s3 Theft Act 1978
summary: 9084 Criminal — dishonestly making off without paying as required or expected.
learningObjectives: Define making off under s3 TA 1978.
Explain 'making off from the spot' and payment expectation.
Apply cases: R v McDavitt, R v Allen.

simpleExplanation.title: Leaving without paying
simpleExplanation.summary: Making off is leaving a place where payment is expected without paying, dishonestly and knowing payment is required on the spot.
steps: D makes off — leaves without paying.

sections.content: **Making off s3** (2.2.6) — distinguish from **theft** where appropriation timing differs.
